entries.what: Commit before IMPLEMENT or the diff gate rejects
logError preserves error.name + message, strips rest
Named export memo uses const pattern
Lazy chunks increase PWA precache count
Gemini REST API over SDK in CF
SHA gate checks for PASS indicators
Mocking httpsCallable requires nested vi.fn() pattern
verifyPin returns profile data with auth result

nodes.title: root
nodes.path: harness, agents, skills, tests, docs, references, .techne

nodes.title: hardening-wave1-commit-and-csp-pin
nodes.description: Commit existing gap fixes, create PR, then fix Wave 1: (1) PIN hash SHA-256+salt, (2) CSP headers, (3) server-side PIN verification CF, (4) rate limit CF, (5) LLM keys proxy

nodes.title: wave1-rate-limit-llm-proxy
nodes.description: Two remaining Wave 1 items: (1) Lock down rate_limits collection in firestore.rules — CF already handles server-side rate limiting. (2) Remove LLM API keys from client bundle by creating a proxy CF.

nodes.title: fix: add tests/test_scripts/__init__.py — resolve pytest collection collision
nodes.description: tests/test_scripts/ missing __init__.py causes module name clash with tests/test_knowledge_graph.py. Entire test_scripts/ dir fails collection when run together.

nodes.title: fix: update TaskDB schema version assertions from 1 to 2
nodes.description: TestSchemaMigration asserts get_schema_version()==1 but schema is at v2 after notes-column migration (commit 7df0b55). Update 3 assertions.

nodes.title: fix: create flat skill entry cards for writing-skill and persona-brainstorm
nodes.description: skills/writing-skill.md and skills/persona-brainstorm.md expected as top-level router targets. Only sub-directory SKILL.md files exist — router 404s silently.

nodes.title: fix: add honcho-precompaction-checkpoint entry to skill-router.yaml
nodes.description: Skill folder exists at skills/honcho-precompaction-checkpoint/ but has no trigger entry in skill-router.yaml. Unreachable via routing.

nodes.title: wave1-llm-proxy-cf
nodes.description: Create proxyLlm Cloud Function to remove LLM API keys from client bundle. CF reads keys from functions env vars and forwards requests server-side. Keep BYOK localStorage path for user-provided keys.

nodes.title: wave2-lazy-loading-and-memo
nodes.description: Lazy loading + React.memo for student-portal. Convert all route imports in App.tsx to React.lazy(), add Suspense fallbacks. Add React.memo to QuizCard, TopicCard, SubtopicRow, LeagueLeaderboardWidget.

nodes.title: wave2-p1-react-memo
nodes.description: Add React.memo to 5 expensive components: QuizCard, TopicCard, SubtopicRow, LeagueLeaderboardWidget, QuizQuestion.

nodes.title: wave2-p2-error-boundaries
nodes.description: Add per-route ErrorBoundaries for route groups: login, dashboard, quiz, admin, calendar/sessions.

nodes.title: wave2-p3-console-pii
nodes.description: Sanitize console.error/warn calls in AuthContext.tsx to strip PII. Create sanitized logger utility.

nodes.title: wave2-p4-skeletons
nodes.description: Skeleton loaders for top 5 slow pages: quiz library, student list, leaderboard, calendar, session list.
